Case# CWErr.cwOperationNotPermittedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwOperationNotPermittedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwoperationnotpermittederr#Discussion)

Calling process does not have permission to perform this operation.
